ops.body: Track F scope split (2026-07-18, orchestrator decision on track-f recon): fusekit has NO daemonkit-shaped drain today — its lifecycle is skew-triggered self-retire + mount-spec journal + LaunchAgent relaunch. 'Wire mount-drain onto drain.*' would be a ground-up holder-lifecycle rewrite colliding with the frozen retire wire fields and the fork-storm constraint (holder-spawns-successor is the indicted self-exec pattern). Track F proceeds as the hard-cut only (pkg deletes, rewires, consumer-owned build stamps, SkewCheck rework, byte-identity-gated wire.Framing adoption). The drain-consumer work is the new Track FD below.
